//: Bundle-only overlay merged over tauri.conf.json at PACKAGING time only: `tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.bundle.conf.json`. It is kept OUT of the base config on purpose — tauri-build validates externalBin/resources paths at `cargo check`/`tauri dev` time, and those artifacts don't exist until `pnpm --filter @uvibe/desktop bundle` runs (uvibe.cjs + Unity package) plus fetch-node-sidecar.mjs (the node-<triple> sidecar). CI's order is bundle → then build with this overlay. `binaries/node` resolves to `binaries/node-<target-triple>` per Tauri's externalBin convention.
